queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the determinants of default associated with individuals lacking a checking account and their contribution to elevated credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Investigating the risk-mitigating determinants of default linked to maintaining a negative checking account balance in credit assessment models.

queries.feature_definition: Savings account status: savings below 100 DM.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the credit risk drivers associated with minimal savings account balances and their correlation with increased loan default probability.
